hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs and institutional teams document deployment readiness, preserve audit evidence and manage role-based controls for secure procurement due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Procurement readiness stalls without clear evidence
problem_description: Due diligence processes become slower and less reliable when deployment details and compliance controls lack structured documentation. Procurement teams face challenges verifying audit trails, governance frameworks, and security measures across disconnected digital asset vendor offerings.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes role-based access, permission logs, governance records and security controls into one traceable compliance layer helping procurement teams verify enterprise readiness efficiently.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY records access policies, permissions and deployment configurations to preserve evidence supporting procurement due diligence and institutional compliance readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another vendor. The audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY supports procurement due diligence by transforming fragmented vendor outputs into structured evidence, audit trails, decision records and enterprise-grade compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured audit evidence, controlled provider orchestration and enterprise deployment standards required to meet procurement and bank due diligence expectations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for procurement due diligence?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides structured evidence, role-based access, audit logs and governance controls designed to support procurement and institutional due diligence for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into connected workflows, enabling structured reviews, case management, decision logging and regulatory rule monitoring to streamline compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence with audit-grade records to support review readiness and procurement-required traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs without disrupting current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying compliance or analytics solutions.
final_title: Review enterprise readiness and procurement evidence
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports audit-grade governance, deployment controls and structured documentation for procurement due diligence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
